title: FilmLight
content: FilmLight is a manufacturer of color grading systems, image processing applications and workflow tools for the film and television industry. The company is headquartered in London. Products. FilmLight's first product was the Northlight film scanner, a motion picture film scanner capable of scanning 16, 35 or 65 mm film formats. It is commonly used for feature film effects, Digital Intermediate and archiving. It then followed with the Baselight colour grading system and the Truelight colour management system.
